results.name: standard_verify
results.command: python3 -c "import html.parser; html.parser.HTMLParser().feed(open('app.html').read())" && grep -q 'executeGAS' app.html && grep -q 'GAS_URL' app.html && echo 'VERIFY_PASSED'

results.name: js_parse
results.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('app.html','utf8'); const scripts=[...html.matchAll(/<script[^>]*>([\\s\\S]*?)<\\/script>/gi)].map(m=>m[1]); scripts.forEach((s,i)=>new Function(s)); console.log('JS_PARSE_PASSED', scripts.length);"

results.name: execute_gas_payload_check
results.output: existing calls only: syncPendingChanges, executeGAS definition, handleInit, loadSchedule
